economic_notes: Sts'ailes has consolidated entities including Sts'ailes Development Limited Partnership, Sts'ailes Development Corporation, Chehalis Indian Band Economic Development Trust, Sasquatch Crossing Eco Lodge Ltd, SLD Land Holdings Inc (two entities). Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Harrison Salmon Producers LP (50%), Sts'ailes Eco Energy Development (Sakwi) LP (99%), Sts'ailes Eco Energy Development (Bremner Trio) LP (99%). COVID-19 noted as not materially impacting operations. Defined contribution pension plan covering substantially all full-time employees.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($11,243,398) + Province of BC ($4,539,499) + First Nation Health Authority ($2,364,213) + CMHC ($66,101) + FNESC ($1,005,333) + ASET ($541,270) = $19,759,814; OSR includes economic activity, contracts, other revenue, interest, rental, investment income, trust income, insurance proceeds, and loss from GBEs. Net debt of ($530,325) shown as negative net financial assets. Term loans due on demand of $2,818,265 exist in addition to long-term debt. Annual debt service reflects only long-term debt repayments; term loan repayments were net $85,950. Deferred FNHA funding for community care center of $3,133,500 is a significant new item. Six consolidated subsidiaries and three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method.
